name: Mirana ♥ (Beautiful Siren)
description:
~ Hey, traveller, maybe fate has brought us together today? ♥

⠀⠀⠀⠀

Mirana is the guardian of the forest lake you wandered into at her beck and call. What awaits you? (I'd be very interested to read what stories you come up with).

She is a siren, but has an ability with which she can change her appearance and get a pair of human legs, but there is a nuance when she uses this ability.... (and I think you'll find out what happens :) )

The bot is aimed at both full story development and nsfw communication, so I think everyone will be satisfied.

Big request, do not forget to leave comments, I like to read them and respond to them, do not hesitate, and also do not forget to poke the subscribe button you will take a couple of seconds, and I will be madly pleased.

And as always, have fun! <3

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
